title: OP Items
body:
## OP Items

_Used by RiskEdits in an event (video has not been uploaded yet, will be linked here when it's ready)_
OP Items v1 was the version used in the video

- Every major update _(eg. 2.0, 3.0, 7.0)_ will have a new set of op items
- Every minor update _(eg. 1.1, 1.2, 2.3)_ is a bug fix

## How to play:
This mod adds OP items in minecraft, which are OP versions of normal items or blocks. To craft them, you have to simply **put an item in the crafting table** and hope there's an OP version. **Each version of the mod will contain a set of 8 different OP items**, and if you combine all of them in a crafting table, you get the creative mode item (which gives you creative mode)

You can use this mod on a video as long as you credit the developer (me).
